channel.title: Visual Studio Code on Scoutman
channel.description: Recent content in Visual Studio Code on Scoutman

item.title: ⚜️ Preparing Something Special
item.author: stationsolutions@gmail.com (rodrigo pinto)
item.description:
I have been preparing something special.

It has been quietly taking shape for a while now, and it comes from a frustration I have had for years.

Anyone who has spent serious time with Azure Automation knows the story: too much back and forth, too much portal dependency, too much friction between authoring, testing, debugging, and deployment. We end up stitching together folders, scripts, manual checks, and half-working approaches when what we really want is a proper development experience.
